scripts.test:api:focused: scripts/ensure_bun.sh bun test test/dcfEngine.test.ts test/dcfRunRouteAuth.test.ts test/rateLimitRoutes.test.ts
scripts.test:security:focused: scripts/ensure_bun.sh bun test test/dcfRunRouteAuth.test.ts test/rateLimitRoutes.test.ts && bash scripts/run_pytest.sh python/tests/test_service_app_sec_routes.py python/tests/test_mirror_security.py
scripts.test:py:engine: bash scripts/run_pytest.sh python/tests/test_engine_golden_acme.py python/tests/test_engine_smoke.py python/tests/test_bridge.py python/tests/test_discounting.py
scripts.test:py:sync: bash scripts/run_pytest.sh python/tests/test_download_conditional.py python/tests/test_excel_parse.py python/tests/test_sync_manifest_hash.py python/tests/test_sync_batching.py
scripts.test:e2e:headed: PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3101 PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_MODE=dev node scripts/with_display.cjs -- playwright test --headed --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:qa: PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3101 PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_MODE=dev PLAYWRIGHT_SLOWMO=150 node scripts/with_display.cjs -- playwright test --headed --workers=1
